steps.title: Apply the loudness finding
steps.content: People perceive meaningful sounds as quieter than meaningless sounds at the same actual volume. If Heartbeats is treated as meaningful music and the nature sounds are treated as noise, the nature sounds would seem louder even at 61.5 decibels.

steps.title: Reject unsupported effects
steps.content: Choice A changes perception into an actual volume adjustment. Choice B claims both sounds would be judged as not 61.5 decibels, which is not stated. Choice D says the two sounds would seem comparably meaningful, contradicting the treatment of nature sounds as noise. The answer is C.
